name: aramo-core
description: Aramo Core monorepo (modular monolith). See README.md and doc/00-README.md.

scripts.tests:integration: ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run --root libs/consent && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run --root libs/examination && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run --root libs/job-domain && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run --root libs/matching && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run --root libs/talent-evidence && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run --root apps/api && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run --root libs/evidence && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run --root libs/submittal && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 npx vitest run --root libs/engagement && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 npx vitest run --root libs/ai-draft && ARAMO_RUN_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run --root libs/canonicalization
scripts.pact:consumer: vitest run --root pact/consumers/ats-thin && vitest run --root pact/consumers/auth-service-consumer && vitest run --root pact/consumers/tenant-console-consumer && vitest run --root pact/consumers/prohibited-source-type && vitest run --root pact/consumers/ingestion-consumer && vitest run --root pact/consumers/portal-thin
scripts.prisma:generate: prisma generate --schema libs/consent/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/identity/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/auth-storage/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/talent/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/ingestion/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/examination/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/job-domain/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/talent-evidence/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/evidence/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/submittal/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/engagement/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/ai-draft/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/entitlement/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/metering/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/company/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/contact/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/requisition/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/talent-record/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/attachment/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/activity/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/pipeline/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/calendar/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/saved-list/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/settings/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/import/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/canonicalization/prisma/schema.prisma
